title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 88.844 - City may condemn property for sewers
text:
88.844.  City may condemn property for sewers. — The governing body of the municipality shall have power to condemn private property for use, occupation or possession in the construction and repair of sewers, in the same manner as other property is condemned for public uses.
(L. 1959 S.B. 344 § 15)
